g.title: NSEM9
g.text: NSEM-9 · Nonseminoma — Post Second-Line Therapy Management

g.title: cr
g.text: no mass or residual <1 cm on CT

g.title: note
g.text: Teratoma with somatic-type malignancy → histology-directed therapy at high-volume GCT unit.
FDG-PET/CT has no role in nonseminoma. Refer to high-volume center for abnormal-marker residual masses.
